results.title: Why China-Pakistan economic corridor has turned out to be a flop
results.description: New Delhi, May 31 (IANS) The China-Pakistan Economic Corridor which was projected for close to a decade as being a game changer for the Pakistani economy has instead turned out to be “a heavily securitised network of incomplete infrastructure, mounting debt obligations, stalled industrial zones, and growing frustration on both sides,” a report has said. ...

results.title: Senior journalist Akash Kolluru joins K Kavitha’s TRS as media spokesperson
results.description: Experienced journalist Akash Kolluru has joined the Telangana Rakshana Sena (TRS), enhancing the party's media and strategic communication operations. TRS

results.title: TMC MP KALYAN BANERJEE TMC MP KALYAN BANERJEE ATTACK HOOGHLY POLICE STATION PROTEST
results.description: സംഘർഷത്തിനിടെയുണ്ടായ കല്ലേറിൽ ശ്രീരാംപൂരിൽ നിന്നുള്ള തൃണമൂൽ എംപി കല്യാൺ ബാനർജിക്ക് തലയ്‌ക്ക് പരിക്കേറ്റു.
